name: Get default currency price from checkout page before paying

condition.statement:
let test = "{{test}}"
let checklogs = "{{checklogs}}"
let freeTrial = "{{freeTrial}}"
return test === "subscription" && checklogs != "upgrade" && freeTrial !="yes"

let test = "{{test}}"
let checklogs = "{{checklogs}}"
let freeTrial = "{{freeTrial}}"
return test === "subscription" && checklogs != "upgrade" && freeTrial !="yes"

let test = "{{test}}"
let checklogs = "{{checklogs}}"
let freeTrial = "{{freeTrial}}"

return test === "subscription" && (checklogs === "upgrade" || freeTrial ==="yes")

let test = "{{test}}"
let checklogs = "{{checklogs}}"
let freeTrial = "{{freeTrial}}"

return test === "subscription" && (checklogs === "upgrade" || freeTrial ==="yes")

let test = "{{test}}"
return test != "subscription"

let checklogs = "{{checklogs}}"
let freeTrial = "{{freeTrial}}"
return checklogs != "upgrade" && freeTrial !="yes"

let freeTrial = "{{freeTrial}}"
return freeTrial !="yes"

let freeTrial = "{{freeTrial}}"
return freeTrial !="yes"

let checklogs = "{{checklogs}}"
let freeTrial = "{{freeTrial}}"
return checklogs != "upgrade" && freeTrial !="yes" && "{{includeTax}}" === "no"

let checklogs = "{{checklogs}}"
let freeTrial = "{{freeTrial}}"
return (checklogs === "upgrade" || freeTrial ==="yes") && "{{includeTax}}" === "no"

const element = document.querySelector('.wc-block-checkout')

return "{{includeTax}}" === "yes" && !element

const element = document.querySelector('.wc-block-checkout')

return "{{includeTax}}" === "yes" && !!element

let test = "{{test}}"
return test === "subscription"

return test === "subscription" && checklogs != "upgrade" && freeTrial !="yes"

return checklogs === "upgrade" || freeTrial ==="yes"

return test === "subscription"

let test = "{{test}}"
return test === "subscription" && "{{includeTax}}" === "no"

let test = "{{test}}"
return test === "subscription"

let checklogs = "{{checklogs}}"
let freeTrial = "{{freeTrial}}"
return checklogs != "upgrade" && freeTrial !="yes"

let checklogs = "{{checklogs}}"
return checklogs === "upgrade"

let freeTrial = "{{freeTrial}}"
return freeTrial ==="yes"

let checklogs = "{{checklogs}}"
let freeTrial = "{{freeTrial}}"
let includeTax = "{{includeTax}}"
let blueSnapVs = "{{BlueSnapVs}}"
blueSnapVs = blueSnapVs.split('.');
const blocks = !document.querySelector('.wc-block-checkout, .wc-block-cart')

return checklogs != "upgrade" && freeTrial !="yes" && includeTax === "no"
        && 
        (
            (blueSnapVs[0] >= 3 && blueSnapVs[1] >= 2 && blocks)
            ||
            (blueSnapVs[0] >= 3 && blueSnapVs[1] >= 5 && !blocks)
        )

let checklogs = "{{checklogs}}"
let freeTrial = "{{freeTrial}}"
let includeTax = "{{includeTax}}"
let blueSnapVs = "{{BlueSnapVs}}"
blueSnapVs = blueSnapVs.split('.');
const blocks = !!document.querySelector('.wc-block-checkout, .wc-block-cart')

return checklogs != "upgrade" && freeTrial !="yes" && includeTax === "yes" 
        && 
        (
            (blueSnapVs[0] >= 3 && blueSnapVs[1] >= 2 && !blocks) 
            ||
            (blueSnapVs[0] >= 3 && blueSnapVs[1] >= 5 && blocks)
        )

let test = "{{test}}"
let checklogs = "{{checklogs}}"
let freeTrial = "{{freeTrial}}"
let includeTax = "{{includeTax}}"
return checklogs != "upgrade" && freeTrial !="yes" && includeTax === "no"
&& test === "subscription"

let test = "{{test}}"
let checklogs = "{{checklogs}}"
let freeTrial = "{{freeTrial}}"
let includeTax = "{{includeTax}}"
let blueSnapVs = "{{BlueSnapVs}}"
blueSnapVs = blueSnapVs.split('.');
return checklogs != "upgrade" && freeTrial !="yes" && includeTax === "yes"
        && test === "subscription"
        && 
        (blueSnapVs[0] >= 3 && blueSnapVs[1] >= 2)

let checklogs = "{{checklogs}}"
return checklogs === "upgrade"

let freeTrial = "{{freeTrial}}"
return freeTrial ==="yes"
